candidates.name: Cold Email Reply Intent Classifier
candidates.pitch: Scrapes Gmail threads, classifies replies as intent, auto-reply, unsubscribe, or dead. Uses lightweight keyword/pattern matching. Quick MVP with rule-based logic.
candidates.pain: Sales reps waste time on auto-replies and out-of-office messages instead of real leads.

candidates.name: AI Token Budget Exhaustion Alert
candidates.pitch: Monitors API calls per tab, predicts token budget exhaustion, warns before hitting limits. Cross-LLM support. Critical for power users of AI tools.
candidates.pain: Users accidentally blow through API quotas mid-conversation and get cut off unexpectedly.

candidates.name: Lead Company Hiring Velocity Score
candidates.pitch: Scrapes LinkedIn job postings over time, calculates hiring velocity. Shows if company is aggressively hiring or slowing down. Signals urgency.
candidates.pain: Sales reps have no signal on whether a prospect company is growing or shrinking before outreach.

candidates.name: GitHub Release Note Auto-Author
candidates.pitch: Scrapes merged PRs since last tag, categorizes by label/prefix, generates changelog draft. Simple semantic versioning prefix detection. Built with GitHub API + simple NLP. Ship in 2 weeks.
candidates.pain: Engineers waste hours manually writing release notes from merged PRs before shipping.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Stripe MRR Waterfall Visualizer
candidates.pitch: Pulls Stripe events, renders real-time MRR waterfall showing new, expansion, contraction, churn. Uses Stripe webhooks. Niche but valuable for SaaS operators.
candidates.pain: Founders and finance teams struggle to visualize subscription churn and expansion in a single view.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GCP Resource Zombie Hunter
candidates.pitch: Queries GCP asset inventory API, flags resources with no traffic for 30+ days. Suggests deletion or downsizing. Integrates with billing exports.
candidates.pain: Teams forget about idle cloud resources, accumulating unnecessary costs month after month.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Conference Attendee Badge Scanner
candidates.pitch: Uses webcam to scan badges via QR or OCR, enriches with LinkedIn/company data. GDPR-conscious with local processing. Great networking tool for solo founders.
candidates.pain: Sales reps collect business cards at conferences but never follow up effectively due to lack of context.

candidates.name: Sales Deck Slide Reading Time Estimator
candidates.pitch: Analyzes slide content density, images, and text length, estimates realistic reading time. Warns before sending. Useful for pitch prep.
candidates.pain: Sales reps send decks that are too long, causing prospects to lose interest halfway through.

candidates.name: Browser Request Signature Debugger
candidates.pitch: Intercepts requests with signatures, replays with modified payloads, shows validation failures inline. Developer tools panel extension. Useful for API integrators.
candidates.pain: Debugging HMAC or JWT request signatures is painful without seeing raw payloads side-by-side.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Webhook Event Type Distribution Chart
candidates.pitch: Logs all webhook events in DevTools panel, shows distribution pie chart over time. Helps identify spam vs signal in webhook streams.
candidates.pain: Developers debugging webhook integrations can't see which event types fire most frequently.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Browser Console API Call Cost Tracker
candidates.pitch: Instruments fetch/XHR calls, tags third-party domains, estimates cost based on typical API pricing. Shows cost per page load in DevTools.
candidates.pain: Frontend devs have no visibility into how many third-party API calls their pages make and at what cost.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Meeting Transcript Redaction Helper
candidates.pitch: Highlights PII, API keys, internal hostnames in transcripts. One-click redaction. Useful for async-first teams. Built with regex + heuristics.
candidates.pain: Engineers waste time manually redacting sensitive data from meeting transcripts before sharing.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
